name: @metorial/nozbe-teams
description: Create, read, update, and delete tasks and projects for team collaboration. Manage task attributes including assignments, due dates, recurrence, priority, tags, and time tracking. Add comments with Markdown text and file attachments to tasks. Organize projects with sections, member access controls, and color coding. Manage tags to categorize tasks across projects. Retrieve team member information and roles. Filter, sort, and select specific fields in query results.
